steps.title: Identify what follows
steps.content: The sentence says there was one personality trait that participants scored high on. The phrase “openness to experience” identifies that trait, so punctuation should introduce a clarifying label.

steps.title: Introduce the label
steps.content: Choice A creates a sentence fragment beginning with “On.” Choice B uses a semicolon, but what follows is not an independent clause. Choice C gives no punctuation before the identifying phrase. A colon correctly introduces “openness to experience” as the trait being named. The answer is D.
